priceHistory.note: 2 PM CT check — prices flat, BTC rallying to $70K on geopolitical news

history.note: He said 'so you can play now properly.' Total POKT: 20,691.69 (~$310)

decisions.decision: HOLD all POKT — conviction bet on infrastructure play

POKT up +1.17% since last check (~2.5h ago), +10.3% over 7 days per CoinGecko. Gentle upward momentum. SOL flat/slightly down at $86.11. No triggers. Hot wallet empty = no trades possible anyway.

decisions.decision: HOLD — prices flat, broader market stirring
decisions.reasoning: POKT held $0.01557 exactly through the afternoon. SOL -0.14% (noise). BTC rallied to $70K on Trump Iran war comment — SOL/ETH reportedly up 4%+ in that move but our prices not reflecting a big pump yet. Watching for delayed Solana ecosystem sympathy move. No triggers, no trades possible (hot wallet empty). Paper trade note: if SOL jumps >5% on BTC catalyst, that's a potential entry signal for future DLMM consideration.

paperTrades.action: Would watch for SOL >$90 as potential DLMM entry zone
paperTrades.reasoning: BTC hitting $70K with Iran war optimism could drag SOL up. If it reaches $90+, could be good DLMM entry for Phase 2. Not acting — no capital in hot wallet, Phase 1 only.

marketContext.SOL: Ranging in $82-90 zone. BTC catalyst (Trump Iran comment → BTC $70K) pushing broader crypto up. SOL up 4%+ in broader move per some reports, though live price shows $85.99. Key levels: $90 resistance, $80 support. Solana + Alibaba launched Shanghai Builder Station (ecosystem positive, Mar 20 event).
marketContext.POKT: Holding steady at $0.01557 — up 6.3% over last 7 days. No major POKT-specific news. Quiet accumulation. 24h volume $30K on our source (low — typical for this token). Infrastructure narrative intact.
marketContext.broadMarket: BTC rallied to $70K on geopolitical optimism (Trump Iran war comment). SOL and ETH each +4%+ in the move. Market sentiment improving from cautious to cautiously optimistic. Not euphoria yet.
